title: Korak 3

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: You should have an object as the second item of your library array.
Your title property should have "Atomic Habits" as its value.
Your author property should have "James Clear" as its value.
Your about property should have the value "A practical book about discarding bad habits and building good ones".
tests.testString: assert.propertyVal(library[1], "about", "A practical book about discarding bad habits and building good ones");

tests.text: The value of your pages property should be a number.

description:
Kreirajte još jedan objekat unutar library niza sa sledećim svojstvima i vrednostima:

Property Value
title "Atomic Habits"
author "James Clear"
about "A practical book about discarding bad habits and building good ones"
pages 320
